## Bug Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run command: `kochava "..."`
2. See error: ...
3. Expected: ...

## Environment
- OS: [e.g., macOS 14.0, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Node.js version: [run `node --version`]
- Kochava version: [run `kochava --version` or check package.json]
- Installation method: [Docker / Local / npm]

## Ollama Status
```bash
# Paste output of these commands
ollama list
curl http://localhost:11434/api/version
```

## Error Output
```
# Paste full error message or logs here
```

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Additional Context
Any other relevant information (screenshots, config files, etc.)

## Possible Solution
If you have ideas on how to fix it.
